records.title: Use DUO services as an international student
records.description: DUO provides education administration, student-finance and diploma services, with international visitors using official public guidance and Mijn DUO for personal decisions and messages.
records.ai_summary: Use only official DUO domains and sign in through the official portal with DigiD when possible. Save decision letters and keep study, address and contact information current.

records.title: Understand the components of student finance
records.description: Dutch student finance can include grants, a student travel product and interest-bearing loans, with eligibility depending on programme, enrolment, age, nationality or equivalent rights.
records.ai_summary: Check eligibility for every component separately and apply for the supplementary grant even when parental income may appear too high. Treat every loan component as repayable debt unless DUO confirms conversion to a gift.

records.title: Apply for and maintain the supplementary grant
records.description: The supplementary grant is calculated using parental income and personal circumstances, and DUO can reassess eligibility when relevant income information changes.
records.ai_summary: Apply once through Mijn DUO and respond promptly if income or parent information is requested. Review the decision and conditions under which the grant becomes a gift after obtaining a diploma.

records.title: Use a tuition-fee loan when eligible
records.description: Eligible HBO and university students may borrow specifically toward tuition fees, with the maximum linked to statutory or documented institutional tuition and added to student debt.
records.ai_summary: Confirm the actual tuition charged by the institution and upload evidence when institutional fees apply. Borrow only the amount needed and remember that the tuition-fee loan accrues interest.

records.title: Understand borrowing and interest through DUO
records.description: An interest-bearing DUO loan can be changed monthly but creates student debt, accrues interest and must be repaid under the rules applying after study.
records.ai_summary: Check grants before borrowing, review the current interest rate and estimate later repayments. Adjust or stop the monthly loan before the stated cut-off when circumstances change.

records.title: Manage the student public-transport product
records.description: Eligible full-time students can receive a weekday or weekend student travel product, which must be linked and collected correctly and stopped when entitlement ends.
records.ai_summary: Follow the linking and collection instructions for the personal travel card and confirm the activation date. Stop the product promptly when DUO entitlement ends to avoid a travel-product debt.

records.title: Check current DUO payment and loan amounts
records.description: DUO publishes current maximum grants, loans and student-finance amounts by education type and living situation, which can change by period.
records.ai_summary: Use the amount table for the correct month, programme and living situation, then verify the personal award in Mijn DUO. A published maximum is not a guarantee of individual entitlement.

records.title: Prepare to repay a DUO student debt
records.description: After the study and any start phase, DUO calculates repayment under the applicable rules, using interest, debt size and income information to determine obligations.
records.ai_summary: Check which repayment rules and fixed-interest period apply, keep foreign and Dutch addresses current, and contact DUO early when payment difficulty arises rather than missing instalments.

records.title: Update education and finance after graduating
records.description: Graduation and disenrolment can affect student finance, travel products and fees on different dates, so students must check which changes are reported automatically and which require action.
records.ai_summary: Confirm the formal disenrolment date, stop any products that do not end automatically and retain proof. Do not use the graduation ceremony date as a substitute for the registered end date.

records.title: Retrieve proof from the Dutch diploma register
records.description: DUO's diploma register provides digital information or extracts for many officially recorded Dutch diplomas, while coverage depends on education type and year.
records.ai_summary: Check whether the qualification and graduation year are covered and download the official digital proof through the secure route. Contact the institution if a recent or eligible diploma is missing.
